title: Fable 5 is never coming back, here's why
summary: David Ondrej reports that Fable 5 has been banned and frames this as signaling the emergence of a permanent underclass. The video discusses concerns around open-source AI and appears critical of the decision.
writeup: David Ondrej reports that Fable 5 has been banned and argues the ban is permanent. The video frames this decision as a signal of an emerging permanent underclass and raises concerns about the treatment of open-source AI. Ondrej takes a critical stance toward the ban, tying it to broader questions around enterprise AI.
